speaker: MACBETH
text: They have tied me to a stake. I cannot fly,

speaker: MACBETH
text: But, bear-like, I must fight the course. What’s he

speaker: MACBETH
text: That was not born of woman? Such a one

speaker: MACBETH
text: Am I to fear, or none.

speaker:
YOUNG
               
              SIWARD
text: What is thy name?

speaker: MACBETH
text: Thou ’lt be afraid to hear it.

speaker:
YOUNG
               
              SIWARD
text: No, though thou call’st thyself a hotter name

speaker:
YOUNG
               
              SIWARD
text: Than any is in hell.

speaker: MACBETH
text: My name’s Macbeth.

speaker:
YOUNG
               
              SIWARD
text: The devil himself could not pronounce a title

speaker:
YOUNG
               
              SIWARD
text: More hateful to mine ear.

speaker: MACBETH
text: No, nor more fearful.

speaker:
YOUNG
               
              SIWARD
text: Thou liest, abhorrèd tyrant. With my sword

speaker:
YOUNG
               
              SIWARD
text: I’ll prove the lie thou speak’st.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Thou wast born of woman.

speaker: MACBETH
text: But swords I smile at, weapons laugh to scorn,

speaker: MACBETH
text: Brandished by man that’s of a woman born.

speaker: MACDUFF
text: That way the noise is. Tyrant, show thy face!

speaker: MACDUFF
text: If thou beest slain, and with no stroke of mine,

speaker: MACDUFF
text: My wife and children’s ghosts will haunt me still.

speaker: MACDUFF
text: I cannot strike at wretched kerns, whose arms

speaker: MACDUFF
text: Are hired to bear their staves. Either thou, Macbeth,

speaker: MACDUFF
text: Or else my sword with an unbattered edge

speaker: MACDUFF
text: I sheathe again undeeded. There thou shouldst be;

speaker: MACDUFF
text: By this great clatter, one of greatest note

speaker: MACDUFF
text: Seems bruited. Let me find him, Fortune,

speaker: MACDUFF
text: And more I beg not.

speaker: SIWARD
text: This way, my lord. The castle’s gently rendered.

speaker: SIWARD
text: The tyrant’s people on both sides do fight,

speaker: SIWARD
text: The noble thanes do bravely in the war,

speaker: SIWARD
text: The day almost itself professes yours,

speaker: SIWARD
text: And little is to do.

speaker: MALCOLM
text: We have met with foes

speaker: MALCOLM
text: That strike beside us.

speaker: SIWARD
text: Enter, sir, the castle.
